allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(x['name']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")

Bash(ssh pi@raspberrypi.local "python3 -c \\"import adafruit_mpr121; import inspect; print\(inspect.getfile\(adafruit_mpr121\)\)\\" && python3 -c \\"import adafruit_mpr121, busio, board; i2c = busio.I2C\(board.SCL, board.SDA\); m = adafruit_mpr121.MPR121\(i2c\); print\(dir\(m\)\)\\"")

Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 pi@raspberrypi.local 'cd /home/pi/communion-project 2>/dev/null && echo "=== REMOTE ===" && git remote -v && echo "" && echo "=== CURRENT BRANCH + STATUS ===" && git status -sb | head -20 && echo "" && echo "=== ALL BRANCHES \(local + remote\) ===" && git branch -a && echo "" && echo "=== LOG GRAPH \(last 15, all branches\) ===" && git log --oneline --graph --all --decorate -15')
